tolerance.notes: Per docs/GRIDS_API.md §4.2 (per-family override). DUO cell_area goes through dot → acos → L'Huilier → sqrt → atan per triangle; libm differences in acos/atan across bindings push the 1e-14 default past. 1e-12 is tight enough to catch algorithm drift (bit-reordering errors show up >1e-9) while stable across platforms.
